## I want to register my implementation with AS-CNPJ

Thank you for sharing! Fill in the information below. The maintainer will validate and, if approved, publish on the community page at [as-cnpj.org/community](https://as-cnpj.org/community).

**All entries are manually curated.** Companies cited must authorize the use of their name.

---

### Project or company name

> How it should appear on the page.

`(fill here)`

### Which library did you use

> @ascnpj/core (JavaScript/TypeScript) · as-cnpj-python (Python) · Other / multiple

`(choose one)`

### How you used it

> A short sentence about the experience. May be edited for clarity, never to change meaning.

### Testimonial author (optional)

### Consent

- [ ] I authorize the display of the project/company name and testimonial on the community page at as-cnpj.org.
- [ ] I confirm I have authorization to cite the company/project name.
- [ ] I understand that publication is curated by the maintainer and may be refused or removed at any time.
